Varies. Storymode endgame stages starts with fights and bosses, and follow Arc 2 rules.
D-Tide has a variety following Arc 2 rules.
Wave 3 is instant boss fight.
Wave 4 is boss, heal, boss, shop, heal, boss.
Wave 1, 2, 5 are more explore, shop, fight, rest, like Arc 1 “runs”, then the boss.
Storymode: Chapter 1-9 is Arc 1
Arc 2 is after that
With a different Arc, different rules

In my option, I would INSTANTLY replace Tinct with Castor. Tinct doesnt provide much at all for her cost to do such. Without her E3 she doesn’t provide crit dmg and ONLY crit rate on her Exalt and 2(or was it 3) cost. Tinct wants you to play strikes as a dps which scales horribly, while as a support, she is better, but too expensive to run her cards. Once she is OE, you could justify the Crit Dmg Buff and 5 Zero Cost Cards in hand, but it’s still a huge deficiet unless you can burst the fk out of the boss.
Castor on the other hand, oh my lord almighty

Castor is a shielder with weakness application, fat shield Exalt, retain 0 cost dmg+card draw+dmg multiplier application(Corrosion), guaranteed Crit rouse w/ more shields on retain Plumes. His strike and defend both give shield on leap, and a good amount(with plumes in hand, together). He can keep you alive, multiply your damage, and solo carry(at E3, built).
Solo carry as damage and shielder.

Oh yea, furthermore, he can fuel his own Exalt pretty well with his innate talent and further at E2. His innate talent is the FIRST Onyx Plume played each turn gives him 10 Aliemus, which stacks his Exalt pretty quickly. At E2, for every Onyx Plume in hand when playing his 2 cost, weakness application+shield card, he gains 5 Aliemus. He pretty much can spam Exalts by himself.

Cantena at non endgame doesn’t make Aigis mandatory. Cantena just needs Thais, and the last two can be anyone that helps you live. If you’re living fine, then you can slot in Horla or Hameln. Endgame, Aigis is more mandatory, and Horla is most used last slot.
Furthermore, if non endgame, you can just ramp harder with Str.
Winkle and Pickman can work, but they arent Awakeners that necessary benefit the most paired with Cantena
Word on the street is, Supports 60, Dps 70, for all 5 teams.
Your main team can bypass those constraints to push storymode thou.

You could go full shield and counter with Nautila, Sanga, Murphy, Caecus

Hi, I'm a new player, I've been playing for a while now, I'd like to show you my characters to recommend some teams, for now I'd like to make the tentacle team and then recover the poison one, can you recommend any awakeners in particular or someone to focus on, I'll accept advice, thanks

Endgame, first fight is the hardest. You want Aigis to stun for Cantena’s shackles turn that eats your hp, or else you just die. Then aftwards Bloodthristy Flail to heal back. Then stall with one enemy alive to maximize resources and farm back Aigis Ult and Skey. Then rinse and repeat.
oooh okayy thank you soo much!! do you think i should pull on the kaleido banner?

With Tawil and Castor, Chapter 4 SHOULD be a cakewalk unless your awakeners are underleveled or underskilled. Otherwise, it might be a fundamentally understanding of the game and how it functions. Whether card play, or how each awakener on your teams work. Reading on the units and how relics and how bosses and how functions work will help alot. Especially reading on bosses.
Its a skill issue or knowledge issue, but not in the rude way. Just more of a… take your time and understand the game more
No rush, and enjoy your time
If you want to expand the amount of awakeners you have access to, you can. If not, I recommened pulling on Awakener and WoDs specific banners to upgrade specific strong awakeners you want.
And get WoDs that are best in slot for them.

I am unsure, I've only just started like 7 - 8 days ago and have just been winging it. Helot is my strongest awakener so far was just wondering if the other version of her was better
Also it looks like you shouldn't be able to pull cantena from reg pulls. Is that true or nah?
There are standard awakeners
Limited standard awakeners
And limited awakeners
Helot is technically better then Ghelot until you get a strong enough support with a high account lvl
Then Cantena is miles better
Standard awakeners can appear on any banner
Limited standards are limited characters that can be pulled from standard banner
Limited awakeners can ONLY be pulled from limited rate up banners
Not even Miles
LIKE
Insanely better
But it has prerequisites
She has*
Cantena does
Damn
Is cantena a limited awakener
Yes
Limited awakener
Not Limited Standard
But as a beginner
She will kill your team, before you kill the enemy
Oof
Amazing damage, but at the cost of you hp
Your hp
And as beginner, you dont have alot
So when I can use her effectively, do I pair her with a healer?
You pair her with another Limited Awakener called Thais
And you can use her effectively when you have a higher lvl account  (maybe like 40 or 50)
WITH
A team that shields or weakens or keeps you alive enough for her to deal her damage
